name: create_transformation_flow
description: Generic Datasphere Transformation Engine. Creates a Transformation Flow (TF_) and target Local Table (TL_) from any deployed SQL view (SV_). Two modes: 'simple' (1-to-1 copy, no aggregation) and 'aggregated' (GROUP BY dimensions, SUM measures). Generates a node-based TF CSN with sqltransform1, target1, connections, and attributeMappings. Dry-run by default.

source_view.description: Technical name of the source SQL view (must start with SV_).

space_id.description: Datasphere space ID containing the source view.

mode.description: 'simple' (default): 1-to-1 copy, all columns, no GROUP BY. 'aggregated': GROUP BY String/Date dimensions, SUM Decimal/Integer measures.

exclude_columns.description: Column names to exclude from the flow (case-insensitive). No columns are excluded by default.

key_columns.description: Explicit list of column names to use as the primary key in the target Local Table (simple mode only). If not provided, falls back to source view key annotations, then first column. Use this when the source view is a JOIN result (e.g. ['BillingDocument', 'BillingDocumentItem']).

tf_name.description: Override the generated TF_ name (must start with TF_). Default: TF_<source_base>.

tl_name.description: Override the generated TL_ name (must start with TL_). Default: TL_<source_base> (simple) or TL_<source_base>_AGG (aggregated).

deploy.description: Set true to deploy to Datasphere. Requires confirm and acknowledge_ai.

confirm.description: Human confirmation flag. Must be true when deploy=true.

acknowledge_ai.description: AI literacy acknowledgement. Must be true when deploy=true.

examples.description: Dry-run simple (1-to-1 copy) on any SV_ view
